heading: Assistance by the Fund to any country harboring international terrorists
label: 286e–11 Assistance by the Fund to any country harboring international terrorists
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of , , known as the Bretton Woods Agreements Act, which comprises this subchapter.act July 31, 1945, ch. 33959 Stat. 512
amendments: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of , , known as the Bretton Woods Agreements Act, which comprises this subchapter.act July 31, 1945, ch. 33959 Stat. 512

children.text: permits entry into the territory of such country to any person who has committed an act of international terrorism, including any act of aircraft hijacking, or otherwise supports, encourages, or harbors such person; or
fails to take appropriate measures to prevent any such person from committing any such act outside the territory of such country.
